mapper.select: select tc.tcId as tcid, tc.tcTermId as tctermid, tc.tcClassId as tcclassid, tc.tcCourseId as tccourseid, tc.tcTeacherId as tcteacherid, yt.yAll as yall, c.cName as cname, cr.crName as crname, t.tName as tname from teaching tc left join yearterm yt on tc.tcTermId = yt.yId left join classinfo c on tc.tcClassId = c.cId left join courseinfo cr on tc.tcCourseId = cr.crId left join teacherinfo t on tc.tcTeacherId = t.tId where tc.tcTeacherId = #{teacherid} order by tc.tcId desc

select s.sId as sid, s.sNo as sno, s.sName as sname, s.sClassId as sclassid, c.cName as cname, sc.scId as scid, sc.scScore as scscore, sc.scStatus as scstatus from studentinfo s left join classinfo c on s.sClassId = c.cId left join scoreinfo sc on sc.scStudentId = s.sId and sc.scTeacherId = #{teacherid} and sc.scTermId = #{sctermid} and sc.scClassId = #{scclassid} and sc.scCourseId = #{sccourseid} where s.sClassId = #{scclassid} order by s.sId asc
